perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a Costco warehouse aisle holding two pink Starbucks holiday-themed coffee capsule boxes. She smiles and talks to the camera. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the product packaging, specifically pointing at the 'Toffee Nut' flavor description. A hand enters the frame to point at different capsule rows. (3) The scene shifts back to the woman holding the boxes and then to the shelf price tag showing '$1,279'. The camera pans across the stacked boxes on the pallet.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music starts. A male voice narrating in Mandarin introduces the Starbucks Nespresso capsules found at Costco. (2) The male narrator's voice is dominant, providing a detailed review of the Toffee Nut flavor, while the female onscreen character occasionally provides short verbal affirmations or laughs. (3) The audio concludes with a price breakdown (21 TWD per capsule) and a final recommendation to buy before the season ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '21元喝到星巴克 太妃核桃' (Functional/Hook): Highlighting the low price of Starbucks coffee. (2) 'Nespresso 咖啡膠囊' (Functional): Identifying the product type. (3) '甜度更低' (Decorative): Promoting a product feature with a positive tone. (4) Full Traditional Chinese subtitles translating the spoken dialogue (Functional).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Feature Detail -> Price Reveal -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character onscreen, 1 male (narrator) whose hands are visible pointing at the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top and a black high-waisted skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial shelving and large pallets typical of a Costco warehouse, stocked with boxes of coffee.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To influence viewers to purchase the Starbucks Nespresso holiday capsules at Costco by emphasizing the value (21 TWD per cup) and the desirable flavor profile (Toffee Nut).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, price analysis, and spoken recommendation to buy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy voiceover narration combined with an onscreen 'host' pointing at warehouse deals.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular 'treasure hunting' format for Costco shoppers in Taiwan, focusing heavily on limited-edition seasonal items.
